---
title: "Session 12"
author: "Dhruvi Sheth 22294"
date: "2 Feb 2026"
output:
  pdf_document: default
  html_notebook: default
---

```{r}
getwd()
```

```{r}
infect <- read.table("../Project_files/data/infect.txt",
                     header = FALSE, sep = "\t",
                     stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

colnames(infect) <- c("sample_id", "nef_ratio", "cell_line")
```

```{r}
rna_files <- list.files("../Project_files/data", pattern = "\\.htseq$", full.names = TRUE)
```

```{r}
serinc5_id <- "ENSG00000164300"

serinc5_list <- lapply(rna_files, function(f) {

  df <- read.table(
    f,
    header = FALSE,
    sep = "\t",
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE,
    fill = TRUE
  )

  df <- df[, 1:2]
  colnames(df) <- c("gene_id", "count")

  df <- df[!grepl("^__", df$gene_id), ]

  ser <- df[df$gene_id == serinc5_id, ]

  data.frame(
    sample_id = sub("\\.htseq$", "", basename(f)),  # clean SRR ID
    SERINC5_RPM = if (nrow(ser) == 0) NA else ser$count,
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
})

serinc5_df <- do.call(rbind, serinc5_list)
```

```{r}
head(serinc5_df)
```

```{r}
plot_df <- merge(infect, serinc5_df, by = "sample_id")
```

```{r}
plot_df <- plot_df[!is.na(plot_df$SERINC5_RPM), ]

```

```{r}
# red = low (0-5), green = medium (5-20), blue = high (20-40)
plot_df$color <- cut(
  plot_df$nef_ratio,
  breaks = c(-Inf, 5, 20, Inf),
  labels = c("red", "green", "blue")
)
```

```{r}
plot(
  plot_df$nef_ratio,
  plot_df$SERINC5_RPM,
  pch = 21,
  bg = plot_df$color,
  cex = 1.5,
  xlab = "Nef+ / Nef- Infectivity Ratio",
  ylab = "SERINC5 Expression (Read Counts)",
  main = "SERINC5 Expression vs Nef Requirement"
)

fit <- lm(SERINC5_RPM ~ nef_ratio, data = plot_df)
abline(fit, col = "black", lwd = 2)
```
```{r}
colnames(plot_df)
```

```{r}
cor.test(plot_df$SERINC5_RPM, plot_df$nef_ratio)
```
